name: chunk-feeder
description: Intelligently split large files into semantic chunks with context summaries for incremental agent processing.
intent_triggers: 把這個大檔案分塊處理
幫我拆分這份程式碼方便餵給 Agent
使用 syntax 策略分塊
這份文件超過 Token 上限，需要分段
split this large file into chunks for the model
chunk the codebase by function boundaries
break the document into heading-based segments
feed the project to the agent in pieces
merge the processed chunks back together
幫我合併已處理的分塊結果

file.description: Path to the file to split

strategy.description: Chunking strategy: auto, syntax, heading, or lines

lines.description: Number of lines per chunk (for lines strategy)

examples.intent: 以函式邊界拆分程式碼
